seo.title: Easy Starter React-Vite
seo.description: A lightweight, configurable Vite React starter for multilingual, themeable, SEO-aware websites.

home.title: Build beautiful small websites without repeating setup work.
home.description: A practical starter for landing pages, portfolios, and company websites with routing, i18n, theme tokens, brand config, SEO helpers, and production scripts already wired in.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you usually repeat, already done.

i18n.title: Multilingual by default
i18n.description: Translations, language switching, localStorage persistence, and RTL direction support are ready.

theme.title: Themeable brand system
theme.description: Change colors, logo, typography, and metadata from a small set of config files.

production.title: Production-ready basics
production.description: TypeScript strict mode, linting, formatting, tests, sitemap generation, and deployment workflow are included.

seo.title: About this starter
seo.description: Learn how the Vite React starter is organized and when to use it.

about.title: A starter for practical React websites.
about.description: This template focuses on the common needs of small and medium React websites: clean structure, easy customization, good defaults, and no unnecessary enterprise architecture.

useWhen.title: Use it when
items: You need a fast landing page or portfolio.
You want multilingual content without rebuilding i18n every time.
You need a reusable brand and theme setup.

avoidWhen.title: Avoid it when
items: You need server rendering or static generation for every route.
You need backend routes in the same project.
You are building a large enterprise application with complex domain modules.

seo.title: Page not found
seo.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
